title: carex tumidula
intro: Carex tumidula, also known as the toad rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is a small to medium-sized plant that grows in damp environments, particularly in areas with alkaline soils. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex tumidula include treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for various health benefits.
